constraints: Do not migrate existing skills yet
Do not introduce multi-agent wrapper duplication yet
non_goals: No Codex runtime installation workflow yet

inputs.architecture_target: Define a portable AI asset strategy that supports multiple agents without hand-maintaining duplicated skill content
user_constraints: Create planning and checklist resources under .dev/refactor-workflows
Plan before moving existing skill or prompt assets

steps: Created a proposal for canonical source, human guide, wrapper, and generation layers
Created a staged migration checklist for future execution
Recorded the currently expected repo-level wrapper paths for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot
validation: The plan, proposal, and checklist are colocated in one workflow directory
The proposal does not yet force any structural migration
The plan keeps .claude/skills as the current wrapper layer until a canonical schema is defined
The proposal distinguishes repo portability from local runtime installation

results.summary: Created the initial planning artifacts for a portable AI asset architecture refactor.
